Evaluation.description: Information about the evaluation form completed for a specific contact.

EmailAddressArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the email address.

CreateTimestamp.description: The email address creation timestamp in ISO 8601 Datetime.

ModifiedTimestamp.description: The email address last modification timestamp in ISO 8601 Datetime.

AliasConfigurations.description: A list of alias configurations associated with this email address. Contains details about email addresses that forward to this primary email address. The list can contain at most one alias configuration per email address.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource. For example, { "Tags": {"key1":"value1", "key2":"value2"} }.

HoursOfOperationOverride.description: Information about the hours of operations override.

ReplicationConfiguration.description: Status information about the replication process. This field is included only when you are using the ReplicateInstance API to replicate an Amazon Connect instance across Amazon Web Services Regions. For information about replicating Amazon Connect instances, see Create a replica of your existing Amazon Connect instance in the Amazon Connect Administrator Guide.

ClaimedPhoneNumberSummary.description: Information about a phone number that's been claimed to your Amazon Connect instance or traffic distribution group.

User.description: Information about the user account and configuration settings.

View.description: All view data is contained within the View object.

Vocabulary.description: A list of specific words that you want Contact Lens for Amazon Connect to recognize in your audio input. They are generally domain-specific words and phrases, words that Contact Lens is not recognizing, or proper nouns.

FileArn.description: The unique identifier of the attached file resource (ARN).

FileId.description: The unique identifier of the attached file resource.

CreationTime.description: The time of Creation of the file resource as an ISO timestamp. It's specified in ISO 8601 format: yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss.SSSZ. For example, 2024-05-03T02:41:28.172Z.

FileStatus.description: The current status of the attached file.

FileName.description: A case-sensitive name of the attached file being uploaded.

FileSizeInBytes.description: The size of the attached file in bytes.

AssociatedResourceArn.description: The resource to which the attached file is (being) uploaded to. Cases are the only current supported resource.

CreatedBy.description: Represents the identity that created the file.

DownloadUrlMetadata.description: URL and expiry to be used when downloading the attached file.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource. For example, { "Tags": {"key1":"value1", "key2":"value2"} }.

MetricResults.description: A list of metric results containing the calculated values for each requested metric. Each result includes the metric name and its corresponding calculated value.

Id.description: The unique identifier of the contact for which metrics were retrieved.

Arn.description: The ARN of the contact for which metrics were retrieved.

NextToken.description:
If there are additional results, this is the token for the next set of results.

The token expires after 5 minutes from the time it is created. Subsequent requests that use the token must use the same request parameters as the request that generated the token.

DataSnapshotTime.description: The time at which the metrics were retrieved and cached for pagination.

ApproximateTotalCount.description: The total count of the result, regardless of the current page size.

UserDataList.description: A list of the user data that is returned.

InstanceId.description: The identifier of the Amazon Connect instance. You can find the instance ID in the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the instance.

Id.description: A unique identifier for the task template.

ContactFlowId.description: The identifier of the flow that runs by default when a task is created by referencing this template.

SelfAssignFlowId.description: The ContactFlowId for the flow that will be run if this template is used to create a self-assigned task.

Constraints.description: Constraints that are applicable to the fields listed.

Defaults.description: The default values for fields when a task is created by referencing this template.

Fields.description: Fields that are part of the template.

Status.description: Marks a template as ACTIVE or INACTIVE for a task to refer to it. Tasks can only be created from ACTIVE templates. If a template is marked as INACTIVE, then a task that refers to this template cannot be created.

LastModifiedTime.description: The timestamp when the task template was last modified.

CreatedTime.description: The timestamp when the task template was created.

Tags.description: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for this resource. For example, { "Tags": {"key1":"value1", "key2":"value2"} }.

TelephonyConfig.description: The distribution of traffic between the instance and its replicas.

Id.description: The identifier of the traffic distribution group. This can be the ID or the ARN if the API is being called in the Region where the traffic distribution group was created. The ARN must be provided if the call is from the replicated Region.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the traffic distribution group.

SignInConfig.description: The distribution that determines which Amazon Web Services Regions should be used to sign in agents in to both the instance and its replica(s).

AgentConfig.description: The distribution of agents between the instance and its replica(s).
